name: sos
description: Reusable, agent-agnostic toolkit: the /goal-10x objective-driven dev loop, the /ship-loop Plan→Code→Validate lifecycle (lavish/treehouse/no-mistakes), the freellmapi free unified-LLM backend, the living-repo awesome-list→knowledge-graph compiler, plus skills for living-knowledge explanations, knowledge graphs, knowledgefy (/knowledgefy <source> → an interactive knowledge-graph page in one shot), dreammaketrue, NVIDIA free NIM, CopilotKit integration, and the future-self framework.
